title: koeleria phleoides subsp. obtusiflora
intro: Koeleria phleoides subsp. obtusiflora is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Poaceae, and is also known as the tufted hair-grass or obtuse-flowered Koeleria. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria phleoides subsp. obtusiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
